name: get_payment
description: Retrieve the full details and current status of an existing payment by its unique ID. Use this to check whether a payment has been completed, is still pending, or has failed. The response includes the amount, status, payment method used, and links to the dashboard.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique payment identifier returned when the payment was created (starts with 'tr_').

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include additional data in the response. Use 'details.qrCode' for QR code data, or 'details.remainderDetails' for remainder details.
